featureItems: One account for sign-in, profile and future reporting.
Simple forms with no extra steps and Ukrainian-language hints.
Quick access recovery if you forget your password.
supportFacts: Adapts to your system theme automatically.
shell.featuresHeading: What you'll be able to do

dashboard.step2: Create your first campaign in the "Campaigns" section

seo.title: Transparent campaigns and organizations | ProzoroBanka
seo.description: Public catalog of verified volunteer organizations and charity campaigns with open progress and expense transparency.

hero.title: Transparent charity campaigns for volunteer teams
hero.description: A public catalog of campaigns and organizations with verified progress, open financial transparency, and confirmed expense receipts.

seoContent.title: How to verify a transparent charity campaign
seoContent.paragraph1: ProzoroBanka helps you quickly assess how open and accountable a campaign is. On campaign pages, you can see the goal, current progress, verified receipts, and spending history. This helps compare charity campaigns not only by emotional appeal but also by factual data important for responsible donations.
seoContent.subtitle1: What matters before supporting a campaign
seoContent.listItem1: Whether the organization is verified and has a public team profile.
seoContent.listItem2: Whether campaign goals match the stated needs and current expenses.
seoContent.listItem3: Whether there are verified receipts and regular campaign updates.
seoContent.listItem4: Whether campaign progress and status are shown transparently.
seoContent.subtitle2: Why this matters for donors and volunteers
seoContent.paragraph2: For donors, this is a way to choose verified campaigns and see the real impact of each contribution. For volunteer teams, this is a trust tool: the more transparent the reporting and data structure, the easier it is to attract new supporters.
seoContent.paragraph3: Verified organization, detailed description, open progress, public receipts, and a clear campaign financial history.
seoContent.paragraph4: The campaign and organization catalog is updated regularly so you always have current information for decision-making.
